methods.int HSVToColor(float[] hsv): Convert HSV components to an ARGB color.
methods.int HSVToColor(int alpha, float[] hsv): Convert HSV components to an ARGB color.
methods.int alpha(int color): Return the alpha component of a color int.
methods.float alpha(): Returns the value of the alpha component in the range \([0..1]\).
methods.float alpha(long color): Returns the alpha component encoded in the specified color long.
methods.int argb(int alpha, int red, int green,: Return a color-int from alpha, red, green, blue components.
methods.int argb(float alpha, float red, float g: Return a color-int from alpha, red, green, blue float components in the range \([0..1]\).
methods.int blue(int color): Return the blue component of a color int.
methods.float blue(): Returns the value of the blue component in the range defined by this color's color space (see ColorSpace.getMinValue(int) and ColorSpace.getMaxValue(int)).
methods.float blue(long color): Returns the blue component encoded in the specified color long.
methods.ColorSpace colorSpace(long color): Returns the color space encoded in the specified color long.
methods.void colorToHSV(int color, float[] hsv): Convert the ARGB color to its HSV components.
methods.long convert(long color, ColorSpace.Conn: Converts the specified color long from a color space to another using the specified color space connector.
methods.Color convert(ColorSpace colorSpace): Converts this color from its color space to the specified color space.
methods.long convert(int color, ColorSpace color: Converts the specified ARGB color int from the sRGB color space into the specified destination color space.
methods.long convert(float r, float g, float b,: Converts the specified 3 component color from the source color space to the destination color space.
Converts the specified 3 component color from a color space to another using the specified color space connector.
methods.long convert(long color, ColorSpace colo: Converts the specified color long from its color space into the specified destination color space.
methods.boolean equals(Object o): Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
methods.float getComponent(int component): Returns the value of the specified component in the range defined by this color's color space (see ColorSpace.getMinValue(int) and ColorSpace.getMaxValue(int)).
methods.int getComponentCount(): Returns the number of components that form a color value according to this color space's color model, plus one extra component for alpha.
methods.float[] getComponents(): Returns this color's components as a new array.
methods.float[] getComponents(float[] components: Copies this color's components in the supplied array.
methods.ColorSpace.Model getModel(): Returns the color model of this color.
methods.float green(long color): Returns the green component encoded in the specified color long.
methods.float green(): Returns the value of the green component in the range defined by this color's color space (see ColorSpace.getMinValue(int) and ColorSpace.getMaxValue(int)).
methods.int green(int color): Return the green component of a color int.
methods.int hashCode(): Returns a hash code value for the object.
methods.boolean isInColorSpace(long color, Color: Indicates whether the specified color is in the specified color space.
methods.boolean isSrgb(): Indicates whether this color is in the sRGB color space.
methods.boolean isSrgb(long color): Indicates whether the specified color is in the sRGB color space.
methods.boolean isWideGamut(long color): Indicates whether the specified color is in a wide-gamut color space.
methods.boolean isWideGamut(): Indicates whether this color color is in a wide-gamut color space.
methods.float luminance(long color): Returns the relative luminance of a color.
methods.float luminance(int color): Returns the relative luminance of a color.
methods.float luminance(): Returns the relative luminance of this color.
methods.long pack(int color): Converts the specified ARGB color int to an RGBA color long in the sRGB color space.
methods.long pack(float red, float green, float: Packs the sRGB color defined by the specified red, green, blue and alpha component values into an RGBA color long in the sRGB color space.
Packs the 3 component color defined by the specified red, green, blue and alpha component values into a color long in the specified color space.
Packs the sRGB color defined by the specified red, green and blue component values into an RGBA color long in the sRGB color space.
methods.long pack(): Packs this color into a color long.
methods.float red(): Returns the value of the red component in the range defined by this color's color space (see ColorSpace.getMinValue(int) and ColorSpace.getMaxValue(int)).
methods.float red(long color): Returns the red component encoded in the specified color long.
methods.int red(int color): Return the red component of a color int.
methods.int rgb(float red, float green, float bl: Return a color-int from red, green, blue float components in the range \([0..1]\).
methods.int rgb(int red, int green, int blue): Return a color-int from red, green, blue components.
methods.int toArgb(): Converts this color to an ARGB color int.
methods.int toArgb(long color): Converts the specified color long to an ARGB color int.
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the object.
methods.Color valueOf(float r, float g, float b): Creates a new opaque Color in the sRGB color space with the specified red, green and blue component values.
methods.Color valueOf(float r, float g, float b,: Creates a new Color in the sRGB color space with the specified red, green, blue and alpha component values.
methods.Color valueOf(int color): Creates a new Color instance from an ARGB color int.
methods.Color valueOf(float[] components, ColorS: Creates a new Color in the specified color space with the specified component values.
methods.Color valueOf(long color): Creates a new Color instance from a color long.
methods.Color valueOf(float r, float g, float b,: Creates a new Color in the specified color space with the specified red, green, blue and alpha component values.
